description: 50 frozen articles for catastrophic regression detection. Scored every run. If NLI accuracy drops >10% from baseline_accuracy, learning updates are halted for that run.

positives.text: Razorpay raises $375 million in Series F funding, valuation reaches $7.5 billion as it expands into Southeast Asia.
Infosys signs $1.5 billion outsourcing contract with BP for digital transformation services.
HDFC Bank acquires 9.99% stake in fintech startup NSDL Payment Bank for $45 million.
Ola Electric files IPO papers with SEBI to raise Rs 5,500 crore through public listing.
Zepto partners with Swiggy Instamart to offer joint delivery services in 25 Indian cities.
Tata Consultancy Services launches AI-powered supply chain platform for manufacturing clients.
Juspay receives RBI approval to operate as payment aggregator, enables B2B payment solutions.
Freshworks acquires CRM startup Device42 for $230 million to strengthen enterprise offering.
Byjus restructures debt worth $1.2 billion as lenders demand repayment after covenant breach.
Paytm partners with Amazon Pay to integrate UPI payments across merchant network.
Myntra launches B2B wholesale platform targeting tier-2 retailers in India.
Meesho raises $275 million Series G funding led by SoftBank Vision Fund 2.
PhonePe receives SEBI approval to launch mutual fund distribution services for B2B partners.
Delhivery signs logistics contract with Flipkart worth Rs 800 crore for 3PL services.
Zomato acquires logistics startup Shiprocket for $200 million to expand delivery network.
Nykaa expands into B2B beauty supplies with Rs 300 crore investment in distribution centers.
ICICI Bank launches API banking platform for enterprise clients, targeting 500 corporate accounts.
Swiggy IPO raises Rs 11,327 crore, listing at Rs 420 on BSE amid strong institutional demand.
Lenskart raises $200 million from Abu Dhabi Investment Authority to fund Asia expansion.
SEBI imposes Rs 15 crore penalty on HDFC AMC for front-running violations in equity trades.
Wipro signs $700 million IT services deal with European telecom giant Deutsche Telekom.
Zetwerk raises $120 million Series E to expand B2B manufacturing platform to Middle East.
ClearTax acquires GST compliance startup for Rs 150 crore to strengthen B2B SaaS offering.
Moglix raises $250 million to expand industrial B2B procurement marketplace across South Asia.
BrowserStack acquires Automated Visual Testing startup Percy for enterprise quality assurance.

negatives.text: India vs Australia cricket Test: Rohit Sharma hits century as team wins by 8 wickets.
Prime Minister Modi inaugurates new railway station in Varanasi during election campaign.
RBI keeps repo rate unchanged at 6.5% amid global uncertainty, focus on inflation control.
India GDP growth slows to 6.3% in Q2 amid global headwinds, monsoon impact on agriculture.
New iPhone 16 launched in India: price starts at Rs 79,900, available from October 1.
Sensex rises 500 points tracking global rally; Nifty crosses 22,000 for first time.
Onion prices surge to Rs 80/kg in retail markets ahead of wedding season demand.
Russia-Ukraine war: India abstains from UN vote on ceasefire resolution for third time.
Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra review: Best Android flagship with AI features for consumers.
IPL 2024 auction: Mumbai Indians buys Pat Cummins for record Rs 20.5 crore.
US Federal Reserve signals two rate cuts in 2024 as inflation cools to 3.2%.
Petrol price today: Fuel prices unchanged across metro cities, check city-wise rates.
BJP wins Rajasthan assembly elections, Vasundhara Raje set to return as CM.
Virat Kohli breaks Sachin Tendulkar record for most ODI centuries in Indian cricket history.
India monsoon 2024: IMD predicts above-normal rainfall, good news for farmers.
Gold prices hit record Rs 65,000 per 10 grams amid global uncertainty and dollar weakness.
China-Taiwan tensions escalate as PLA conducts military exercises near Taiwan Strait.
Netflix adds 9 million subscribers globally in Q3, beats estimates with new content.
Crude oil prices fall to $75/barrel as OPEC+ extends production cuts to end of year.
India wins ICC World Cup 2024, defeats South Africa in final with 7-wicket victory.
Delhi air quality index hits 350 in November, severe pollution level declared.
Apple launches Vision Pro in India at Rs 3.5 lakh price; limited pre-orders open.
RBI issues new Rs 500 note with updated design, old notes remain legal tender.
Kerala floods: 15 dead, 20,000 displaced as heavy rains continue for third day.
Stock market today: Sensex falls 1,200 points on global sell-off, midcaps bleed 3%.
